fetch_hrrr_forecast live smoke
  bbox=(-82.0, 26.4, -81.6, 26.8)
  variable=2m_temperature
  forecast_hour=1
  cog_bytes=2460
  shape=(13, 13)
  bounds=BoundingBox(left=-82.00382319866289, bottom=26.38131683480809, right=-81.58430068377507, top=26.80083934969589)
  min=295.77 K
  max=300.02 K
  mean=296.87 K
